title: AI pairwise judgment
description: One judge model's verdict on an A/B pair for a single presentation order and sample. Idempotency key: (pair_id, judge.model, judge.prompt_sha, order, sample). winner_arm names the better arm in true (un-flipped) terms; "error" marks a recorded parse failure of the judge output (rationale "(unparseable judge output)").

order.description: presentation order shown to the judge: ab = arm a first, ba = arm b first

spec.description: judge slot label, e.g. sonnet, grok, gpt-5.5

winner_arm.description: the better arm in true terms; "error" = the judge output could not be parsed
